description: Standardize the metadata of the Landsat dataset located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif in ESA SNAP Desktop. Rename the bands as follows: 'band_1' to 'SWIR1', 'band_2' to 'NIR', 'band_3' to 'Red', and 'band_4' to 'Green'. For all four bands, set the unit to 'reflectance' and configure No-Data masking with a value of 0.0. Save the modified product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/curated_landsat.dim.
